ogTitle: Tucabia vs Tucki Tucki: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tucabia and Tucki Tucki.
heading: Tucabia vs Tucki Tucki — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tucabia, New South Wales and Tucki Tucki, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tucki Tucki has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Tucabia (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tucabia or Tucki Tucki safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tucabia has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Tucki Tucki scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tucabia scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Tucki Tucki scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tucabia or Tucki Tucki?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tucki Tucki has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
